# External Datasets

This directory is the storage root for downloaded public datasets and privately collected project data.

Subdirectories:

- `public/`: third-party datasets acquired from official sources
- `private/`: project-specific captures collected on target devices and in target rooms

Follow:

- `../../docs/dataset-acquisition-plan.md`
- `../manifests/public-dataset-acquisition.yaml`
- `../manifests/private-dataset-collection-plan.yaml`
